name: node-example
description: Hexagonal architecture example in Node.js + TypeScript

scripts.pg:migrate-db-up: node-pg-migrate -m ./migrations/psql --host db --port 5432 --database hexagonal_demo --user postgres --password postgres up
scripts.pg:migrate-db-down: node-pg-migrate -m ./migrations/psql --host db --port 5432 --database hexagonal_demo --user postgres --password postgres down
scripts.migrate-db-up: npm run pg:migrate-db-up && npm run mongo:migrate-db-up
scripts.migrate-db-down: npm run mongo:migrate-db-down && npm run pg:migrate-db-down
